title: APA Corporation Declares Cash Dividend on Common Shares
text: HOUSTON, May 23, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The board of directors of APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) has declared a regular cash dividend on the company's common shares.

title: APA Stock Stumbles Since Witnessing a Beat on Q1 Earnings
text: APA Corporation (APA) bought back 3.7 million shares at $38.93 apiece during the first quarter. The company also shelled out $78 million in dividend payment.

title: Growth Stocks Are Back — Analysts Like These 8 The Best
text: Growth stocks in the S&P 500 are racing back. And analysts are scrambling to choose their favorites.

title: APA Corporation: The Best Of Both Worlds, Value And Growth
text: APA Corporation is an independent oil producer that will make both a value and growth investor smile. APA beats the competition on a multitude of valuation metrics, against both on-shore and offshore drillers.

title: APA Corporation Announces First-Quarter 2023 Financial and Operational Results
text: HOUSTON, May 03, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) today announced first-quarter 2023 results. Results can be found on the company's website by visiting www.apacorp.com or investor.apacorp.com.

title: The Game Has Changed
text: In the early 2020s, the stock market looked much like basketball used to: a big man's game. As examples, money management firms like Vanguard and Blackrock lumbered to higher heights of assets while the passive firms swallowed more market share.

title: APA Q1 Earnings Preview: This is What Investors Can Expect
text: While weak commodity prices are likely to have hurt APA's first-quarter results, higher gas output and a drop in operating costs might have acted as a cushion.
